Redraw all four SVGs for clarity at small sizes: hardcover
cookbook with curved pages and visible binding, Thai mortar
and pestle, sharp-cornered restaurant menu card, classic
shopping cart. Bump icon size from 1rem to 1.15rem with
heavier 1.8 stroke weight. Mobile view switches from
hidden labels to a tab-bar layout with icons above tiny
labels, matching familiar mobile app patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix CSS @import path for reset stylesheet

The reset CSS was being copied to /css-reset-and-normalize-sass/ but the
@import in site.css resolves relative to /css/, so browsers got a 404.
This could cause font rendering issues due to the failed @import blocking
CSS processing.

feat: persistent model loading, TUI tool rendering overhaul and process viewer

- Load LLM model once at startup via Arc<LlmEngineHandle>, reused across
  all agent turns and subagents (no more per-call disk reloads)
- Tool rendering: blinking bullet when running (yellow), blue when done,
  red on error; output preview with ⎿ prefix and 5-line collapse
- User prompt styled with ❯ blue prefix and white bold text
- Process viewer (Ctrl+B): overlay listing active bash processes with
  elapsed time, K to kill, Esc to close
- Bash tool refactored with spawn + kill_on_drop + shared BashKillSignal
  for external termination from TUI
- Running tools show real-time elapsed and ctrl+b hint for bash

commit.message:
Feat: Support raw Response passthrough from actions (#242) (#243)

Actions can now return a Bun Response object directly for HTTP requests,
bypassing JSON serialization. This enables file downloads, binary content,
streaming, and custom headers while preserving Keryx's routing, middleware,
and observability.

Response objects opt out of standard Keryx headers (CORS, security headers,
session cookie) — the action takes full control. This feature is HTTP-only;
WebSocket, CLI, and task transports continue to expect JSON-serializable returns.

- Add instanceof Response check in buildResponse()
- Add comprehensive tests for response passthrough
- Document raw response pattern in guides and references
- Bump version to 0.13.0 (minor: new feature)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(session): trigger semantic indexing for parent directory after memory extraction (#429)

Extracted memories were not searchable because _index_memory() only enqueued
the memory file (level 2) to EmbeddingQueue, without triggering SemanticQueue
for the parent directory. The hierarchical retriever searches level 0/1 first,
so without parent directory .abstract.md/.overview.md being generated and
indexed, the search could never discover the directory containing new memories.

- Add _enqueue_semantic_for_parent() call in _index_memory() to generate
  parent directory summaries after every memory indexing operation
- Remove duplicate _enqueue_semantic_for_parent() calls from
  _merge_tool_memory() and _merge_skill_memory() since _index_memory()
  now handles this uniformly

Closes #422

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: OpenViking
repository.description: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). commit.message:
Reduce hand-holding in reviewer prompts and CLAUDE.md

Based on analysis of 43 review rounds across 4 jobs, ~60-70% of reviewer
feedback was process/checklist complaints (empty directories, missing
requirements.txt, multiple seeds: no) rather than substantive science.
The research agent spent most rebuttal effort on process fixes while
fundamental design flaws went uncaught.

Changes:
- Remove Phase 6 (Process Compliance) from reviewer.md entirely
- Remove 9-item binary checklist from reviewer output format
- Remove directory structure audit from code-reviewer.md Phase 1
- Remove Git Hygiene phase from code-reviewer.md
- Replace rigid output checklists with focused format (Correctness,
  Results Integrity, Key Issues, Recommendations)
- Reduce score dimensions from 7-10 to 3-4
- Remove "multiple datasets (2-3 minimum)" imperative from CLAUDE.md
- Replace rigid 5-directory structure with flexible guidance
- Remove prescriptive Experiment README template
- Trim literature review, experiment design, file conventions sections
- Remove "experiment script" language throughout (causes one-off scripts)
- Change reviewer models from opus to sonnet

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add LinkedIn profile link in contact section

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix auto-grade: expand abbreviations in selection before matching

OKC ML, CHA ML, etc. were returning None because the grader
compared "okc" against "oklahoma city thunder" without expanding
abbreviations. Now runs _expand_abbrevs() on selection text for
moneyline and spread matching.

commit.message:
perf: admin performance optimization (110+ fixes, 6 indexes, baselines) (#13)

* fix(dashboard): 긴급조치 미배정/미응대 수치 불일치 수정

* docs(quick-406): PRD 대시보드 긴급조치필요/미응대/3일이상 상담 수치 점검 및 수정 SUMMARY 및 STATE 업데이트

* fix(assign): 배정 시 status NEW→ASSIGNED 전환 누락 수정

배정 API에서 status를 LeadStatus.NEW로 하드코딩하여
배정 후에도 status가 NEW로 유지되는 버그 수정.
이제 첫 배정 시 NEW→ASSIGNED로 전환됨.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(status): ASSIGNED를 정식 상담 단계로 승격

- lead-status.ts: ASSIGNED를 deprecated → consultation stage로 이동
- 상태 플로우: NEW → ASSIGNED → CONTACTED → ...
- transition rules: NEW→ASSIGNED, ASSIGNED→CONTACTED 등 추가
- auto-transition: ASSIGNED도 7일 미활동 시 LONG_ABSENT
- dashboard types: ASSIGNED 라벨/색상 추가
- lead-status-indicator: ASSIGNED 아이콘(UserCheck) 추가

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(quick-407): leads API inProgress 필터 + comma-separated status + queue legacyId 필터 추가

- inProgress 필터에 CONTRACT_PENDING, WON 추가하여 대시보드 ACTIVE_LEAD_STATUSES와 일치
- status 파라미터에서 comma-separated 값 지원 (예: ?status=CLOSED_WON,WON)
- queue API 기본 모드에서 legacyId: null 조건 추가하여 legacy 데이터 제외

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(quick-407): 대시보드 링크 href 수정 — 오늘 신규/계약성사 필터 정합성

- 오늘 신규 상담: startDate/endDate=오늘 날짜 추가 (KST 기준)
- 계약성사: CLOSED_WON → CLOSED_WON,WON (대시보드 합산 수치와 일치)
- types.ts: CONTRACT_PENDING을 LeadStatusKey 및 inProgressStatuses에 추가
- AdminDashboard + ManagerDashboard 동일 패턴 수정

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs(quick-407): 대시보드-리스트 필터 정합성 수정 SUMMARY 및 STATE 업데이트

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(leads): useAdminFilters에 inProgress 키 추가 — 대시보드→리스트 필터 연동 수정

대시보드에서 ?inProgress=true로 리스트 페이지 이동 시 nuqs가 해당 URL 파라미터를
파싱하지 못해 전체 리드가 표시되던 버그 수정. initialFilters에 inProgress 키를
추가하여 URL 파라미터가 정상적으로 API 호출에 전달되도록 함.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* perf: fix 30+ CRITICAL N+1 queries and performance bottlenecks across admin

Stats APIs:
- team/dealer/team-members stats: N+1 → batched groupBy (50+ queries → 3-5)

Organization:
- assignment-rules: N+1 user lookup → single batch query
- teams list: removed full members include (-80% payload)
- dealers: added missing pagination (skip/take)
- dealer leads page: fetch single dealer instead of all

Work Reports:
- streak calc: 365 sequential findFirst → 1 findMany + in-memory
- overview team/monthly/weekly trends: N+1 loops → single query each

Ad Manager:
- campaigns: added pagination, metrics scoped to current page only
- bid simulation: sequential 40s → parallel batched 4-6s
- lead attribution: N individual updates → batched $transaction
- budget overview: 3 sequential → 2 parallel queries
- conversion analysis: removed 100% duplicate platform spend query
- ROAS analysis: sequential → parallel groupBy

Vehicle Data:
- EP unmatched: N+1 findFirst per group → single groupBy
- trims: fixed incorrect in-memory sort after DB pagination
- orphan trims: N+1 suggestions → batch lineup query
- batch-price-corrections: N findFirst → single findMany + Set
- QualitySummaryWidget: raw fetch → React Query (10min cache)

System & Analytics:
- scraping-logs: added pagination + select (exclude large JSON)
- ETL import: 3N sequential → batched $transaction
- payment-requests: full table scan → relation filter
- web analytics: 40-60 queries → summary-only default (~5 queries)
- UV count: findMany+.length → COUNT(DISTINCT) raw SQL
- chart rendering: O(n²) → O(n) pre-computed max

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* perf: fix 80+ HIGH/MEDIUM issues across admin (Promise.all, memoization, pagination, caching)

CRM + Sales:
- tasks/payments/settlements/contracts/deliveries: parallelize all DB queries with Promise.all
- leads: add min 2-char search guard, parallelize phone duplicate check
- by-dayofweek: replace JS aggregation with raw SQL GROUP BY
- tasks/calendar: remove double auth, add take:500 limit

Organization:
- teams detail: reduce user dropdown pageSize, targeted state updates
- team members stats: combine duplicate groupBy into single SQL
- users: select instead of include for dealerProfile/teamMemberships
- organization: React.memo on tree components, Set-based dedup, DEALER filter
- assignment-rules detail: parallelize fetchRule + fetchDealers
- sortable-team-list: React.memo on SortableTeamMemberRow

Ad Manager:
- campaigns detail: add take:50 to ad copies
- keywords: cache filter options, add take/orderBy to rank_history
- creative: batch version performance queries
- competitor summary: merge 4 sequential queries into single CTE SQL
- sync-status: add take:5000, debounce sync button
- ranking: DB-level pagination instead of client-side
- analysis pages: add LIMIT to landing-pages, geographic, recommendations
- export: reduce take limits, add date range guards
- dashboard: increase staleTime to 5min
- excel parseStore: add 1hr TTL cleanup
- attribution: useMemo for CPA/ROAS calculations

Vehicle + Marketing:
- generations: reduce nested includes in list view
- news: add server-side pagination
- reviews: debounce sort order change, parallelize queries
- banners: lazy loading images, remove N+1 pre-check
- traffic-analytics: parallelize duplicate groupBy queries

Reports:
- daily/weekly reports: parallelize aggregation queries
- daily/weekly: remove duplicate session calls
- calendar events/unified: add take:500 limits
- stats: eliminate duplicate assignedLeadIds query
- overview: use groupBy+_sum for top performers

System + ETL:
- logs: exclude rawData/rawAiResponse from list
- scraping-log detail: truncate JSON preview to 100 lines
- fuzzy-matcher: add in-memory cache with TTL
- contract-importer: batch lead/dealer lookups
- notification-templates: extract dialog component, useMemo columns
- system-settings: $transaction for bulk PATCH
- notification-templates PUT: rely on constraint errors
- audit-logs: convert to useQuery
- etl history: set debounceMs to 300

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* style(header): 메뉴 순서 변경 — 간편견적/프로모션을 장기렌트 앞으로

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* perf: fix LOW-priority issues (23 loading.tsx, useMemo, console cleanup, constants)

- Add 23 missing loading.tsx Suspense boundaries for admin routes
- Add useMemo to task-list.tsx filter computations (pendingTasks, completedTasks)
- Remove debug console.log statements from crm-timeline.tsx
- Extract inline year/month arrays to module-level constants in weekly report

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* perf(db): add 6 composite indexes for admin query optimization

- contracts: (status, created_at DESC) for filtered list queries
- settlements: (dealer_id, status) for dealer-scoped queries
- lead_assignments: (assigned_to_id, is_active, assigned_at DESC) for perf stats
- calendar_events: (user_id, status, start_at DESC) for unified calendar
- consultation_tasks: (owner_id, status) for task list by owner
- audit_logs: (action, entity_type, created_at DESC) for filtered audit log

Applied to Supabase DEV. PRD migration pending review.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs(perf): add admin performance baseline measurements (pre-fix)

Browser measurements from production before PR merge:
- Dashboard stats API: 4.3s, Performance stats: 4.5s
- Leads API: 3.0s, Contracts API: 2.8s
- FCP: 400-1400ms (acceptable)
- API response time is the primary bottleneck

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: Bug1-4 — crossover quality gates, combo cap, commit msg, label

Bug 1 (HIGH): run_crossover_round had no hard_filter or duplicate check
  → bad crossover strategies (MaxDD=-80%, <10 trades) were recorded as
    success=True, inflating success rate and misleading InternalAnalyst
  → Added hard_filter mock-object check + name-based duplicate skip

Bug 2 (MEDIUM): run_crossover tested all 2,184 combos every 25 iters
  → ~11 min pause per crossover round
  → Added max_combos=300 param to run_crossover(); random sample when exceeded
  → main_loop calls with max_combos=300 (~90s instead of 11min)

Bug 3 (LOW): git commit message used bt.sharpe_ratio (pre-sweep value)
  → changed to result["sharpe"] (post-sweep, actual recorded value)

Bug 4 (LOW): TOP 3 label said "by composite score" but sorts by Sharpe
  → changed label to "by Sharpe ratio"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
ci: add release-please for automated versioning (#8)

* ci: add release-please for automated versioning

Introduce release-please to automate semantic versioning based on
Conventional Commits. On each push to main, release-please analyzes
commits and creates/updates a Release PR proposing the next version.
Merging the Release PR creates the git tag, which then triggers the
existing GoReleaser workflow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: per-user translation settings per room

translateTo is now stored as { userId: string[] } so each user
has independent translation language preferences. The viewing
user's own settings determine which languages and in what order
translations appear in their bubbles — regardless of which
participant sent the message.

- updateRoomTranslate(roomId, userId, langs) stores per-user
- GET /rooms returns the requesting user's own translateTo
- PATCH /rooms/:roomId/translate saves under req.userId key
- getAIAnalysis uses union of all participants' translateTo
  so AI generates all needed translations in one pass
- getUserTranslateTo() + getAllTranslateTo() helpers with
  backward compat for old array format

fix(tui): simplify screen rendering with let-chains and reduce nesting

Systematic refactoring of TUI screens to use Rust let-chain patterns,
eliminating deeply nested if-let blocks. This is a pure readability
improvement with no behavioral changes.

Affected screens: accounts, alerts, beads, events, guardian, machines,
mail, oracle, overview, rch, sessions. Also updated lib.rs main render
loop, theme (add #[must_use]), and widgets (add #[must_use], use
format string interpolation).

Average nesting reduction: 1-2 levels per screen. Events and guardian
screens saw the largest simplification (~30-50 lines each).

fix(cli): apply clippy lints, let-chain refactors, and doc improvements

- Use let-chain patterns to reduce nesting in watch filter matching,
  CLI export timeline/notes rendering, and event filtering
- Replace format!("...{}", var) with format!("...{var}") throughout
- Add #[must_use] annotations to public constructor functions in robot,
  schema_registry, and watch modules
- Use map_or/map_or_else instead of map().unwrap_or() chains
- Use method references (e.g., std::string::ToString::to_string) where
  clippy prefers them over closures
- Fix doc comments to use backticks for code references (health_change,
  debug_log, not_helpful, etc.)
- Cast f64::from(u32::MAX) instead of u32::MAX as f64 in pct()

commit.message:
fix: Use direct_technical_scan as fallback so signals show real BUY/SELL

The advanced ML system and legacy intraday ticks both fail on Streamlit
Cloud, causing all stocks to show HOLD at 25% confidence. Now uses
direct_technical_scan() (RSI/MACD/SMA analysis via PSX DPS API) as a
fallback before defaulting to HOLD. This function already works in
Pro Scanner and produces real BUY/SELL/STRONG_BUY/STRONG_SELL signals.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement full FloodRisk ML flood forecasting pipeline

- Config system: ExperimentConfig composing TrainerConfig with YAML loading
- Data layer: CAMELS-US loader, BasinNormalizer, download scripts
- Datasets: CatchmentDataset with pre-indexed (basin, time) samples
- Models: CatchmentLSTM and CatchmentTransformer (nn.Module)
- Losses: NSELoss with numerical stability for constant targets
- Metrics: NSE, KGE, CSI, POD, FAR (torchharness Metric subclasses)
- Callbacks: HydroLogger for hydrograph visualization
- NeuralGCM bridge: forecaster, regrid, cache (optional JAX dependency)
- Evaluation: per-basin metrics, benchmark comparison, plotting
- Training/eval scripts, 4 notebooks, 36 passing tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(sync): preserve campaign revenue when Klaviyo report fails silently

The campaign-values-report intermittently returns null (API timeout/error),
causing the cron to overwrite klaviyo_campaign_revenue with 0 in the
store_revenue_summary. This made all campaign revenue show as R$0.00
in the portal dashboard and calendar.

Fix: when campaignRevenue=0 AND campRows is empty, read the existing
summary and preserve the previous non-zero campaign revenue value
instead of overwriting with 0. Same protection added for flow revenue.

Also adds logging when flow/campaign reports return null to aid debugging.

  each one: matched subscriptions get the invoice added instantly; unmatched
  vendors create a new subscription and invoice automatically — no form
  required. Queue progress panel shows per-file status.

  PDF or image in a full-screen modal with an "open in new tab" fallback.
- Account email field was already present; now more visible under vendor name.

commit.message:
Add action mode (block/report/both) with report flow automation (#9)

* add block/report/both action modes and fix report flow bugs

This commit introduces the ActionMode feature allowing users to choose between
blocking, reporting, or both blocking and reporting flagged accounts.

Features:
- ActionMode setting ("block", "report", "both") in storage and popup UI
- Dynamic UI labels reflecting the selected action mode
- New reportUser() function that automates Twitter's report flow
- executeAction() dispatcher that handles block, report, or both actions
- Stats display conditionally shows blocked/reported counts based on mode

Bug fixes:
- Scope span selector in report flow to dialog container only
- Add dismissAllDialogs() to properly close report wizard before blocking
- Call dismissAllDialogs() before blockUser() in "both" mode to prevent DOM
  state contamination between sequential UI interactions
- Update CLAUDE.md with actionMode setting and report flow DOM selectors

Tests:
- Updated component tests to pass required actionMode prop
- Added tests for reported and actioned status badges
- Added tests for actionMode storage defaults and loading

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* exclude main tweet author's replies from scanning

Extracts the OP's username from the page URL (/user/status/id) with
a DOM fallback, then skips any replies from that author during
collection so only third-party replies get analyzed and actioned.

The platform generateDefaultSlug function was producing bare 8-char hex
slugs (e.g., 39d8a1f3) instead of the user- prefixed format used by all

in production to have inconsistent slug formats.

- updateIconPreview: SVGアイコンのときfaviconプレビューを表示
- style.css: .ext-icon-edit スタイル追加

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add SaveManager, fix path routing, fix stand submenu refresh

- SaveManager.js: full save/load system (localStorage, download, clipboard paste, new game, auto-save)
- Game.js: integrate SaveManager in init(); add Save/Load section to debug menu; fix home approach fork to align with actual door row (y=37, x=20); add door threshold path tiles from TMX tile-206 positions; add renderBuildingLayers() call after edge overlays; increase wild crop seed drop to 75%, planted to 25%
- TilemapRenderer.js: renderBuildingLayers() method; doorTilePositions array for door threshold detection
- UIManager.js: renderStandMenu(keepSubmenu) flag to avoid closing submenu on refresh; _refreshStandSlotSubmenu() for live item count updates
- Tileset: updated home.tmx / store.tmx + CSV exports; add house1.tmx
- CLAUDE.md: update save/load and path routing docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
